channel.title: Book Review on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Book Review on yexca'Blog

item.title: My Thoughts on "Manga Guide to Digital Electronics"
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash Introduction Recently, I read “Manga Guide to Digital Electronics.” Here are some quick notes. I’m not covering everything from the book here. Preliminaries Digital circuits are split into Combinational Circuits and Sequential Circuits. Combinational Circuits: Their output is determined solely by the current combination of inputs. Sequential Circuits: These circuits have “memory.” MIL Symbols Logic gate symbols like AND and OR …
